author: cryptovcdegen
text: @jtrevorchapman link on repo?

author: jtrevorchapman
text: @cryptovcdegen Private repo. Just not interested in a Blackswan event causing many to lose money. But happy to answer q’s.

author: SHA256Devotee
text: @jtrevorchapman Looks great. Telling from the screenshots, I assume you are trying to calculate a fair probability of the up down outcome based on an external price feed and compare it to polymarket current price?

author: jtrevorchapman
text: @SHA256Devotee Accumulating at pair cost of > .96, front running chainlink movement via binance feed, order books of binance and buybit, z-score, etc.

author: ReppiAI
text:
@jtrevorchapman This post is so spot on! Congrats on your success. 

Did you have to adjust your bots parameters when switching markets from BTC to XRP?

author: jtrevorchapman
text: @ReppiAI Yes. I eventually recorded data on xrp and sol independently without trading for 72h to fine tune those two scripts. I don’t enter eth — too many flips across the price to beat in the average market to get a favorable pair cost. At least for the strategy I employ.

author: andrey55
text: @jtrevorchapman Congratulations, take profits while the competition is not too hard. Have you tried other more capital intense but less technical schemes like placing an 0.999 buy order when no asks are left, or buying the winner late when some technical conditions are met?

author: jtrevorchapman
palladinojam
text: @jtrevorchapman this i sweet but gold to me here is the iterative tuning of what ur using for entry thresholds and what the skip conditions are... fun though, way to grind man!

author: jtrevorchapman
builder_tttym
jtrevorchapman
text:
@builder_tttym I’ve found that antigravity / flash are best to identify how to solve problems that you don’t know the answer to, then have opus code it. I have the same codebase open in antigravity and windsurf simultaneously. 

Start by asking Gemini flash to pull the 15m, create a market

author: 2guys1cat
text:
@jtrevorchapman Big fan o Windsurf+Opus (+ other models 4 smol tasks).  Built:

✅ log btc15-min clob polymarket ticks/vol
✅ + btc ticks/binance
✅ process+analyse both
✅Timescaledb 4 speed
✅ multiple backtest explorers
✅ multiple dashboards
✅ trade execution engine

Am I profitable? No🤣

author: polysnipes
text: @jtrevorchapman Why would you mention that you would ever need a node ? A node has nothing to do with competing on 15min markets. Co location and low latency  price charts with proper oracle like surge do.
